## Safety Checklist

- [ ] This change avoids customer-specific NetSuite account IDs, internal URLs, screenshots, credentials, tokens, private keys, and proprietary scripts.
- [ ] Public-facing claims are sourced or clearly framed as project policy/experience-based guidance.
- [ ] Oracle, NetSuite, SuiteScript, and related names are not described as endorsing this project.

## Scope Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs, tests, or examples that are affected by this change.
- [ ] I kept unrelated cleanup out of this pull request.
